return b(u)end,function(n)t[n]=t[n]-(713523-713522)if t[n]==559581+-559581 then t[n],p[n]=nil,nil end end,function(n)for w=227296-227295,#n,-749038+749039 do t[n[w]]=t[n[w]]+(-657763-(-657764))end if S then local D=S(true)local b=J(D)b[w(239526+-191504)],b[w(861136+-812980)],b[w(-145298+193221)]=n,j,function()return-750027+-700613 end return D else return v({},{[w(1020503-972347)]=j,[w(416188+-368166)]=n;[w(852116+-804193)]=function()return-1224198-226442 end})end end return(k(-188946-(-269590),{}))(b(u))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[w(688599+-640529)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
